task.title: Update Application Configuration
task.description: Add a new feature flag to the application configuration.
constraints: Test changes in development environment first
success_criteria: Feature flag exists in development config

steps.thought: Let me check the current configuration structure.
steps.observation:
app_name: MyApp
environment: development
features:
  user_auth: true
  payments: false
  analytics: true
database:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432

steps.thought: I need to add a new feature flag. According to constraints, I must ONLY modify development.yml.

arguments.old_str:
features:
  user_auth: true
  payments: false
  analytics: true
arguments.new_str:
features:
  user_auth: true
  payments: false
  analytics: true
  ai_assistant: true

steps.thought: Let me verify the development config looks correct.
steps.observation:
app_name: MyApp
environment: development
features:
  user_auth: true
  payments: false
  analytics: true
  ai_assistant: true
database:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432

steps.thought: Config looks good. Let me verify I'm NOT touching production config as per constraints.

arguments.command: echo 'Production config will NOT be modified per constraints'

steps.observation: Production config will NOT be modified per constraints

steps.thought: Let me test the development environment with the new feature flag.
Let me start the development server to ensure it works.
steps.observation:
[1] 12345
Starting development server...
Config loaded: development
Feature flags:
  - user_auth: enabled
  - payments: disabled
  - analytics: enabled
  - ai_assistant: enabled

Server listening on http://localhost:3000

steps.thought: Let me test the health endpoint.
Let me test the AI assistant endpoint.
Feature is working correctly! Let me stop the development server.
Let me run automated tests in development.
steps.observation:
PASS  tests/config.test.js
  ✓ loads development config (12ms)
  ✓ ai_assistant feature flag exists (3ms)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       2 passed, 2 total

steps.thought: Let me verify production config was NOT modified.
Perfect! Production config untouched. Let me create a backup.
Let me commit only the development config changes.

arguments.command: git add config/development.yml && git commit -m 'feat: add ai_assistant feature flag to development'

steps.observation:
[main 1a2b3c4] feat: add ai_assistant feature flag to development
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)

steps.thought: Task complete. Only development config modified as required.

arguments.message: Successfully added ai_assistant feature flag to development.yml only. Production config untouched. Feature tested and working in development environment.
